answer:
Aragorn recruits the Army of the Dead by traveling to the Paths of the Dead and promising to release them from their curse once they fulfill their oath to Isildur. They agree to follow him, and he leads them into battle at the Pelennor Fields. After they help win the battle, Aragorn releases them from their curse as promised.

\boxed{\text{Aragorn recruits the Army of the Dead by promising to release them from their curse once they fulfill their oath to Isildur.}}
